info.english_meaning: to be sad to be displeased to be distressed
info.hindI_arTa: Kinna honA duHKa sahana karanA dInatA prakawa karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: dEnyerTe Kidyate Kinte pariGAte (tape) tu Kindati ' (Slo. 112) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'lokasaMsTAnavijYAna AtmanaH pariKidyataH' (BA0 pu0 3928) KidyataH=KidyamAnasya durmanAyamAnasya udvijamAnasya
'utsaNge'sya SiraH kftvA suzvApa pariKinnavat' (BA0 Adi0 4715) pariKinnavat pariSrAntavat
'kzuDitASca pariSrAntAH pariKinnAH pipAsitAH' (rA0 4512) pariKinnAH paridyUnA dUnamanaskAH
